task: I need to send a quick note to a supervisor about missing part of a shift because of a personal conflict. Can you help me put together a brief message that covers the basics and is easy to send?

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a short, easy-to-send version:

Hi [Supervisor Name], I wanted to let you know I’ll be missing part of my shift today because of a personal conflict. I’m letting you know as early as I can so you have a heads-up.

If you want, I can also make it a little more casual or more direct, depending on how you usually text them.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Short and clear.
